meta.description: Individual reviews extracted from competitor product listings with star ratings and review copy

products.product_name: The Ecology Works DustmiteX Dust Mite Spray

reviews.review_text: Ok I have only seen 1 mite and so I went ballistic.. ha! I dusted everything in my bedroom and spare bedroom so far and the man cave as well, then I vacuumed each room like 10 times. I washed all my bedding (carried sheets etc..) in a huge bag to my washer .. washed everything in HOT and dried in HOT too .. in the meantime, I sprayed this stuff on my dressers, etc ..and the carpeted floors. I saturated my mattress, box springs and even my head board... I opened both windows in each room and turned on the ceiling fans and shut the door for 6 hours. I even washed my curtains in each room. (I'm already a clean freak as it is)...After that I vacuumed everything again and put it all back together (in each room) and then VERY lightly sprayed everything down again. Yes, I'm a freak that way! Ha! There is no smell to this spray and if you put it on thick it is kinda on the sticky side, just vacuum again and it won't be sticky anymore. I also use a diffuser with Tea Tree Essential Oil and Lavender Essential Oil combined for an hour in the morning and early evening because all types of bugs do NOT like the smell, so they just don't hang around. I like this spray so much that I ordered another bottle for my mom's room downstairs, just to keep bugs at bay. Hope this helps anyone looking to get rid of that itchy bug feeling period! Especially in your bedroom and even if you don't see any bugs, the itching feeling is bad enough .. Quick Shipping!
Works great … spray every other week due to our new cat and allergens

reviews.review_title: Dust mites beware!!! Also keeps fleas out of a carpeted pet friendly home too!
reviews.review_text: Only giving it a 4 because in the 20+ years I've used this product they NEVER CHANGED THE CRAPPY SPRAYER that kills my hands! BUT, this stuff works, you can tell in like 10 minutes that the dust mites are falling into the abyss!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I always know it's time to do it when I'm sneezing at my computer and waking up in the mornings all stuffed up. Do it after vacuuming, even better if you've carpet cleaned and it's all dry - I try to use this every other month, especially where I sleep, dress, sit and where the cat sleeps. These buggers live in our dander and our pet's dander. Don't forget to wash your curtains to remove dust and debris before spraying, it just works better and lasts longer. :)

reviews.review_title: Noticeable relief and easy to use
reviews.review_text: This spray has made a noticeable difference in my home. I started using it on bedding, mattresses, and upholstered furniture, and I noticed an improvement in allergy symptoms pretty quickly. It's easy to apply and doesn't leave a strong or unpleasant smell. I like that it can be used on different surfaces, including pet areas. It gave me peace of mind knowing I was treating dust mites effectively. Overall, I'm very happy with the results and would definitely purchase this again.

Can't speak to if it works or not, I dont think I even needed it but I'm nesting and everything needs cleaned. My gripe with this is the sprayer part is so cheap and leaks and turns while tru to use it. You'll need a better bottle to pour this in.

Absolutely great product. I recently developed in dust my allergy I want to say around the pandemic and my clothes bedsheets were all killing me with the skin irritation. I never had experienced this before in my life and it was a sudden change. I'm not sure if I was exposed to a bug bite of some sort, I went over to my cousin's house, sat down on their furniture and after that it was absolute hell I thought I had bedbugs, but I guess they just had so much dust mite infestation that I didn't know and it triggered an allergy that I'm stuck with but now I'm better able to manage because of this product honestly would consider it to be a cure of sorts.
This Product works as intended. Came in a timely matter.

It works! Wash your linens, spray this stuff on your mattress and carpet (i don't have pets), I also washed my curtains and sprayed them. Got a good night's sleep and didn't wake up swollen and congested
It actually works!

products.product_name: RID Home Lice, Bed Bug & Dust Mite Spray

reviews.review_title: Amazing product & worked quickly for me
reviews.review_text: This works like a charm for me. I sprayed it at work in the nasty air vents & in my car's vents. No more issues!! My eyes before were red & watery, my nose kept running, etc. until I used this. My job was at some risk! Worth every penny.
Does it job. If you are doing more than two rooms buy more.

I have always used this to kill lice and eggs on couches, pillows, the car seat etc .but never paid attention that it's also for bed bugs! It kills instantly! Every type of blood sucking Insect has found their way into my home this year! This will not completely rid u of bed bugs unless they just moved in! This spray is the best I've found yet to kill on contact and keep them away for weeks! I spray the whole mattress, pillows etc and leave it....I highly recommend it! The smell isn't strong, and it lasts for weeks!! Try it now.

reviews.review_title: Works well, but I wish there was more.
reviews.review_text: Love it. It does work great. One will cover atleast your living room. I would recommend buying a couple of them that way you can spray your whole house. The smell is not too much either. It smells like it should and it disappears fairly quickly for what it is. Be sure to leave the room you've spray until completely dry. Try to make sure you dont inhale it due to it chemical properties. (Just saying) I do recommend this product. I only took away one star because I do wish one can would cover more ground. Spray all cloth items that you cant wash! Stuff animals, blankets, pillow cases, CARPETS! Curtains, tapestries, clothe posters of any kinda. Spray and let set to dry!

reviews.review_title: Spray de tratamiento para el hogar con permetrina
reviews.review_text: El Rid Home Lice Bed Bug Dust Acarros Spray con permetrina es una opción sólida para quienes buscan una solución rápida y práctica contra ácaros, pulgas y garrapatas en el hogar. Su eficacia probada y facilidad de uso lo hacen ideal para un primer tratamiento o como complemento a otras medidas de control (lavado frecuente, aspirado). Sin embargo, es importante seguir las instrucciones precisas, usar protección personal y considerar la reaplicación periódica para mantener la barrera protectora a largo plazo.
Kind of small

reviews.review_title: Works well on mites. Good for a specific area of infestation.
reviews.review_text: I used this on mites. They weren't actually dust mites, they were thrips that a psychopath kept putting in my house. It was helpful when I didn't want to bomb the whole house and just use on a specific area. Actually I did bomb the house. Twice. And didn't want to do it again because of the hassle removing the cats. And the poison load on the indoors. And the cats. So it was helpful and effective under the couch cushions.
It seems to be working

products.product_name: Allergy Asthma Clean - Allergen Spray Concentrate 2 Pack

reviews.review_text: I have to say that I had my doubts. But, I decided to give it a try. I'm happy that I did. I cleaned the house as usual, sweeping , mopping, and dusting. Then I sprayed the whole house, beds, furniture, floors, curtains, anything and everything. Then I waited. No more sneezing, no stuffy nose. Wow! I'm spraying once a week and it's working. Did I mention that I have two large cats. I'm feeding them Purina Live Clear dry cat food too.
Great product. You can research the active ingredient to see for yourself. I have three housecats, and this is safe to spray.

reviews.review_title: Son says it's easier to breathe now..fewer tissues needed!
reviews.review_text: My son has shown allergies to the top 12 environmental allergies and we have had a hard time managing it without shots (he doesn't want to do them). We also have a doodle and even with frequent washings, our tissue budget is up there. my sil used this spray while our dog and another were at her house and she said it helped her dog and plant allergies SO much so I bought it. I've been spraying it a couple times a week in the major play areas, bedrooms, and the couch and my son says it feels easier to breathe. He also has to blow his nose less frequently. Worth the price for me if it helps him at all! It's been a long journey for his allergies. I do notice spots on the wood floor after spraying so I often will mop after the spray has settled.

My partner and I have various allergies. We have two cats and he's allergic to cat dander. I vacuum and dust religiously but inevitably he has to take Allegra or Benadryl - until I discovered this product! Since using the Allergen spray, his reactions have lessened. He can go days without taking allergy meds. Love this product!

I love that the refill pack is available. Works great with the original bottle. sprays out Good. My boyfriend hass cat allergies, and we have 2 cats, so I am always spraying this around the house. It sprays onto fabric good, however it does leave residue if sprayed in the general air and gets on the floor. (Which kind of makes sense.) Soemtimes the residue turns white. Overall, I liked it enough to buy the refills, so I've got to say its a go to in my house.
Great product! It reduces the allergens so that my family can come over and enjoy our company again

This product does work. Follow the directions and spray. I notice the difference within minutes. I will order this again. Dust is gone. Really nothing is falling in the air to make it dusty anymore. I spray it whenever.

reviews.review_title: Not sure if it is effective
reviews.review_text: I don't know if works, and be careful it can leave spots on tvs and mirrrors

reviews.review_title: This Solution Saved My Sanity! Bye bye Mite
reviews.review_text: I very rearly write review, unless its something that mind blowing. This solution is, life saving! I literally felt like I was loosing my mind. No matter how many time I cleaned out my vacuum and remove the dust it never stopped dust mite from crawling up and down my legs after vacuuming. These dust mite actually bite. I had enough when I started feeling them on my bed and sofa. I was loosing my mind. All this time my husband slept like a baby, stating that I was too sensitive. I tried multiple powders and sprays nothing worked. I bought this and truly did not except much. But praise God it WORK!!! I LOVE THIS. It worked. Now to be completely honest, I vacuum, steam clean and then spray this solution. This usually last about two weeks and then I repeat the process every2 weeks. This seem to keep these draculas mites at bay. I am soooooo greatful. Thank you for saving my sanity.

reviews.review_title: The Quality Of This Particular Brand
reviews.review_text: After experiencing a brain aneurysm in 2023; I became terribly allergic to cats/dogs and pet dandruff. My HomeCare person actually had to buy some for her to continue working with me oddly though the winter months were worse. So I purchased this brand for when we're indoors at my home. This works great!!!

You need to follow instructions properly. Don't apply too much. I usually open the windows first, apply the product wherever I need then let it dry. Is not a strong smell but of course, if you put too much, you will feel it! Is important to let it settle before covering pillows or sitting in the couch (where I usually apply the product). My son is allergic to dogs and we recently found out, years after having our dog. We are trying this to control the breathing issues, and so far is working. We combine this with other product from the same brand that controls dander in pets and it can be used between baths. Easy to handle and sprays very efficiently.

reviews.review_title: Seemed to work - of note, it was leaking
reviews.review_text: I acquired a recliner with soft plush material from a relative who had dogs and cats, not particularly on the chair, but lives in home and could have been from time to time. No noted hair on the chair, but due to allergies to cats and dogs - I purchased this and used prior to bringing inside. After using this spray - No noted animal scent on it and no lasting smell of product. Seemed to work well as it's been in house about a month and no allergies noted. Granted had animals been on this frequently, I'm not sure how this would work. Only frustrating part is the bottle came busted and had been slowly leaking (the paper inside with bottle was wet) during transit. Just enough of a leak to be a nuisance - I keep in a plastic bag and it's ok. May want to reconsider packaging when shipping

My roommate has a cat allergy and this has been a lifesaver for me! I spray it around all fabrics in common areas as well as the carpet and it works great. I do have to re-buy a little sooner than I'd like, but it works so well that I don't mind!
Has a strong bleach like smell causing a slight headache

This stuff works really good for cat dander. I can't keep cat's off my bed. I spray this every night on pillow and comforter before bed. Allow it to dry. I ran out for a couple days and my allergies came right back. Got it delivered and sprayed bedding and woke up feeling so much better. I won't run out again!! I never had allergies until I turned 61. Glad it works and keeps me allergy free!!!
Worked really well clean the house some morning that allergic to dog hair and it was able to minimize any reaction really good product
Great product

products.product_name: Allersearch ADMS Anti-Allergen Spray - Large Format

reviews.review_text: I had this problem, every night I go to bed, lay in my bed, within 30mins, I will sneeze. I change my bed sheet every week, I steam clean my headboard, I have the hepa bed vaccum that has ultra violet light for my bed for dust mites and germs. I have air purifier running all the time in my bedroom. Still, wihtin 30mins, sneeze. So I got an allergy test, and the only thing tested positive was dust mites. Ok, so I got this spray. Then one day, I spent 3 hours, dusting and vaccuming my bedroom, especially the curtains, the blinds, the headboard, shelves. Then after I vaccumed I used this spray, sprayed on everything, hard surface I wiped and soft surface I just let it air dry. It didn't change any color on any fabrics, and when I was done, I walked out of the bedroom and later walked in, oh wow! I could def tell the difference! It has a very very light bleach smell to it, and the air in the bedroom just smelled so 'soft' and gentle on my nose. And that night, I got in bed, until I fell asleep, nothing! No itchy nose, no running nose, I was actually breathing much better too. I think this gallon would last me about 3 months if I do it twice a month? so far I have only done it twice, two weeks apart and it has been working great. I think I can probably do once a month now. Yes it is helpful.

reviews.review_title: Allergic to life, and this stuff works!
reviews.review_text: You can count on both hands the things I am NOT allergic to. Allergy shots, crazy quantities of steroids, antihistamines, decongestants, and NSAIDs are all in my seasonal repertoire. We have 5 air purifiers (one in each bedroom plus some in main living spaces), allergy air filters in all return vents, hepa filters in all vacuums, Demite laundry additive to control dust mites in bedding and clothing items, and now I apply this spray at least once a month on all carpets and upholstered items in the house. I even use it on my dogs (yes, I am allergic to the dogs that sleep in my bed) during pollen season. They won't let me spray it on them, but I pour it on paper towels and rub it all over them after they come in from potty time. I know this stuff works because when I skip a month in the summer, my daughters and I spend a lot of time sneezing and itching. At that point, I hose down the house with the stuff, wait for it to dry, vacuum, and -- thank heavens -- symptoms are temporarily alleviated. During tree pollen season, I have to spray everything each week; as you might imagine, one gallon goes quickly in the spring. I wet a paper towel and wipe the areas around computers and TVs to control the dust mite issue, and (again) it seems to help. If you're reading this review, your allergy problems are probably affecting your quality of life in a big way, so I'd say this product is definitely worth a try. I started out with the smallest spray bottle and liked it so much I ordered the gallon container within a day of using it the first time. [2015 UPDATE] I am still using this product--just ordered yet another gallon of it in anticipation of the Spring 2015 Allergy Season. I now use empty Febreeze bottles to spray it (they give off a really nice, fine mist for curtains and other fabrics). Another reviewer posted a photo of some bleached out curtains--I have used this product EVERYWHERE in my house and have never seen a bleach stain. I have never seen a stain. It is the only anti-allergen spray I purchase now.

It actually works! We rescued two kittens from spca. We had fallen in love. Unfortunately, my son (also his best friend who is our neighbor) both had allergic reactions to the kittens. We didn't have the heart to return them. I researched online and read all the reviews (love amazon). I purchased ADMS anti-allergen in large size meant for refills and my own spray bottle. Followed directions. Vacuumed and cleaned first, sprayed liberally, waited to dry, then vacuumed and dusted again. I started with the playroom. After I was done called both boys for the big test. No reaction. Previously my son's friend began sneezing with swollen red itchy face almost immediately. Today he stayed and played for hours, no reaction AT ALL! My son is not as allergic, and happy to say he also had no reaction. I am thrilled and I have to admit surprised. Truthfully I didn't really expect it to work that well, even with the rave reviews. I don't usually write reviews, but I am so grateful to be able to keep my sweet kitties and the boys are allergy free, I want to help anyone else who is thinking of buying this. Now I am off to do the rest of the house. Side note- some people mention a smell and sticky residue. There is no strong smell. I absolutely no fragance, I hate that febreeze type stuff that leaves a perfume smell everywhere. There is an ever so slight smell of bleach, very faint, but it is there. It just smells clean to me. I only used it on one fabric item, did not affect or change the color at all. It did leave my wood floor the tiniest bit sticky, barely noticeable once it dried, but it went away and is totally worth it. The boys went from being miserable to NO allergic reaction! So happy!

reviews.review_title: A must have for allergy sufferers!
reviews.review_text: I use this monthly.

reviews.review_title: Did not solve my allergy issue
reviews.review_text: After reading the raving reviews where many allergic kids did not suffer from the symptoms after their parents used this, I gotta admit this hasn't worked well for me. I have bad case of skin allergy to dustmites. I followed the instructions and all but I still get triggered on new allergies whenever I sit on the couch or bed. So it isnt a miracle cure for me, unfortunately :(

products.product_name: The Ecology Works - Dust Mite and Flea Control (Powder)

reviews.review_text: I'm impressed. I have OCD and live on a hill getting a lot of dust. I noticed less dust in the house but real proof is my car! My car doesn't have a spec of dust right now. I just bought 3 more bags, I have a large house. Wonder if it can be used in a fogger!

I was introduced to this product when my son was little. He was/is allergic to almost everything, but mostly to dust mites. This works so well! They also have laundry detergent, pillow cases, mattress cases and more. This is a great company! Once this dries you and animals can walk on it, and it is non-toxic! You CANNOT spray animals! You spray the home; around the home; carpets; furniture, etc. It's a wonderful product for killing fleas, eggs, tics and mites!
Give it a shot to see how it works. Overall it 50/50 chance to kills bed bug.

I have two cats and one large dog. The dog was/is on Trifexius and the cats were on Frontline (which apparently stopped working, hence the fleas) and are now on Revolution. In addition to a flea comb, those medications, one bath with Dawn dish soap, and treating the house with one bug bomb, Vet's best Natural Flea and Text Home Spray, and The Ecology Works Dust Mite and Flea Control, we are flea free! This product seemed to help. I also applied it more often then the bottle suggested. However, I don't think I applied as much at a time as it suggested. Honestly, I really like how it removes animal oder from our carpets and furniture. I recommend vacuuming really well and then spraying it. This bag will last us a really long time too.

I was skin tested by my allergist, and found to be allergic to dust mites. I got a 4 micron mattress cover, and 4 micron pillow covers, both of which helped. I purchased this product after seeing a university study that showed it to be very effective against dust mites. I sprayed it on my carpets (about 400 square feet total, I live in an apartment). My symptoms, including the night time stuffy nose, cleared completely. I have to re-spray every eight weeks. It takes one, two pound package, to do the 400 square feet of apartment. When spraying, I move everything possible. A heavy desk and bookcase stay in place. I move the mattresses to spray under the bed. If treating the carpets in the entire house is too expensive, just spray the bedroom, keep the bedroom door closed and, if needed, buy a HEPA filter fan and put it in the bedroom. Amazon sells them. It's me versus the dust mites, and I'm winning!

A couple of months after taking our indoor only cats to the vet, we found that we had fleas. I went crazy attempting to find a safe product to get rid of the fleas from our carpet and fabric furniture, without harming my family or the cats (we treated the cats with Frontline Plus). I found this product searching the internet and was very impressed with the results. This product is not a insecticide, it works by making the environment dry and arid, which then breaks down the outer shell of the fleas and/or mites body, within three weeks all fleas are dead. You can use a steam cleaner to clean the carpet and apply the product at the same time or mix water and product in a spray bottle to treat mattresses and furniture. The product continues to work for 6 months, we now have two indoor/outdoor dogs, I clean my carpets in the spring and apply product as prevention.

Didn't work for me - I definitely have fleas and dust mites, and I have sprayed my whole room many times thoroughly over the past few months, with no results. It probably kills a few of them, but the constant itching and biting have not abated one bit.

I did a lot of looking around for ways to fight my indoor allergies and dust and this Dustmite powder is the best. I used it 1x all over the house just a week ago and already see a dramatic difference in the visible dust on surfaces and my vacuum is less full as well. I have marked my calendar to apply again in 8 weeks. My nose is not stuffy when I wake up either. Now I just gotta get up the energy to wash the dog and cat w/ their new anti dustmite shampoos.....

products.product_name: Allersearch ADMS Anti-Allergen Spray 128 Oz - Trigger Sprayer

reviews.review_text: I had a dust mite 'bloom' after a warm December with the windows opened! I am very allergic to dust mites so I was miserable before this got delivered. I just kept vacuuming, but it didn't seem to be doing anything. I used this one time and it worked like a charm!
It did kill all the mites and my chickens were all safe.
It does have a slight scent to it.

reviews.review_title: It needs to be a little bit stronger. I had to buy more to make it work.
reviews.review_text: Took too much to alleviate the problem I had to buy more
Great product, I am please with my purchase and the flawless delivery by www.amazon.com!

First off, the smell was horrible and very potentially. Second I followed the instructions and sprayed my furniture to damp but the bedbugs were crawling a hour after I sprayed like they had a good drink. This did absolute NOTHING!!! I ended up spraying my furniture with isopropyl alcohol mixed with water and put my furniture outside in the cold. I spray this mixture everyday along with the amazing Ortho Home defense bedbug spray. It is 32 degrees and lower here in Michigan so I put my furniture outside. I plan on leaving it out there for 3 weeks (I am the only one at home) while spraying with Ortho daily. I would like my money back!

reviews.review_title: Very Effective Formula and Great Price
reviews.review_text: Works great and is a good value compared to at least one competitors product that I've found (and used) with the same active ingredients profile, but without added scenting which I believe could be reduced just slightly in this product.

More of a repellant than killer. Recommend Crossfire spray and Temprid dust instead, retreating every 2 weeks, for 3-4 sessions. Both of these latter two products are currently available on Amazon and are pro grade.

summary_stats.note: Some reviews appeared duplicated in source data (Allersearch 128oz Trigger Sprayer reviews repeated 3x). Deduplicated to single entries.
